headline: Friday's your proving ground—dominate today's discipline
summary: Skip emotional snacking today, hit 40 minutes of cardio, and close the 0.28 kg weekly gap you're currently losing.
details: Eat only portioned Huel and whole plant foods today—zero snacking detours, especially this afternoon and evening. Get 40 minutes on the rowing machine or treadmill; the deficit you need weekly is barely achievable at current pace. You're 297 days behind: today you prove Fridays don't derail you, and you reclaim 0.04 kg toward your 88 kg goal.
